terms_section1_content: Users are responsible for the accuracy of information provided when registering for the TSM platform. Account security and password confidentiality are the user's responsibility.
terms_section2_content: AI scores and talent analyses provided by our platform are predictive data generated based on uploaded videos and information. These scores do not constitute professional advice or a definitive guarantee of success. TSM cannot be held responsible for transfer or investment decisions made based on these analyses.
terms_section3_content: The ownership of videos uploaded by athletes belongs to the athlete. However, by uploading these videos to the TSM platform, the athlete is deemed to have granted TSM the right (license) to analyze this content, present it to scouts, and use it for platform promotion.
terms_section4_content: TSM reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate platform rules without prior notice.
privacy_section1_content: Personal and physical data of athletes such as height, weight, position, and performance videos are collected for evaluation by our professional scouting network.
privacy_section2_content: All your data is stored on **Supabase** infrastructure with AES-256 encryption methods, adhering to the highest security standards. Your data security is our priority, and we fully comply with GDPR standards.
privacy_section3_content: Your data is shared only with authorized scouts and sports clubs that you approve through the platform. Your data is never sold to third parties for advertising purposes.
privacy_section4_content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your data. Under the 'right to be forgotten,' your data is permanently removed from our systems when you delete your account.
refund_section1_content: TSM is an instantly accessible digital SaaS (Software as a Service) platform. Due to the digital nature of purchased packages, the right of withdrawal is limited once service use has commenced.
refund_section2_item1: Refunds are not issued for packages where AI analysis has started or premium data access has been provided.
refund_section2_item2: In cases where the service cannot be provided due to a technical malfunction, requests are evaluated within 14 days.
refund_section2_item3: Refund requests are meticulously reviewed on a case-by-case basis, considering the specific circumstances of each situation.
